name: Palmy
description: '''Eve Pancharoen''' ({{Langx|th|อีฟ ปานเจริญ}}; born 7 August, 1981), known professionally as '''Palmy''' ({{Langx|th|ปาล์มมี่}}), is a Thai [[pop singer]] who has recorded and released several albums, including concert DVDs on the [[GMM Grammy]] label, beginning with her self-titled solo debut, ''Palmy'', in 2001. She has performed live with [[T-Bone (rapper)|T-Bone]] and appeared as a guest [[vocalist]] at other concerts and [[Music festival|music festivals]] in several Asian countries, including [[Japan]], [[South Korea]], [[Singapore]], and [[Thailand]], as well as performing at events in [[Australia]] and the [[United Kingdom]].
